summary: Vendor E-Way Bill Acknowledgement module full E2E + regression. Backend: 23/23 pytest cases pass (/app/backend/tests/test_vendor_ack.py) covering plants master (seeded defaults + admin-only add + dispatch=403), Master Dispatch asn_number+plant field create/get/update, /vendor-ack/records shape+search+filter, /stats, happy path run (ASNTEST100 -> Completed with before_submit+after_success screenshots + Dropdown x3/Field Entered/Checkbox Ticked/Success events, master_dispatch.vendor_ack_status='Completed'), error taxonomy (NOTFOUND stays Pending w/ after_failure + retry allowed 200, ACKED -> Completed 'Already Acknowledged' + retry=400, ERR -> Retry Scheduled w/ 2 Retry events + after_failure, BADDROP transporter -> Failed 'Dropdown Value Not Found'), blank ASN -> 400, screenshots/{name} serves PNG, /logs returns list. Regression: /eway/stats+records+validation/test-run 11/11 all_ok, /master-dispatch stats+list+export/excel, /packing/slips, /dispatch all 200. Frontend: /portal/modules/vendor-ack loads for admin - Automation nav group present with ASN/E-Way/Vendor Ack submenu, vack-stats + vack-panel visible, vack-start-automation disabled without record; selecting an MD auto-fills Transporter/ASN, Start Automation runs and grid shows Completed after polling. Log dialog opens with 42+ log lines, Screenshot dialog shows 2 images (before_submit + after_success), Retry hidden for Completed. Master Dispatch edit dialog exposes md-edit-asn_number + md-edit-plant with the 2 seeded plants + previously added TEST_PLANT. E-Way + Packing pages still load.

design_issues.screen: Any page with <select> (VendorAck record-select, plant dropdown, DispatchList page-size)
issues: React hydration warning in browser console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. This is caused by the visual-editor/emergent instrumentation injecting <span data-ve-dynamic=...> wrappers into <option> children for dynamic labels. It does not break functionality (all selects work) but pollutes the console. Not a real product bug; ignore unless the dev-tool wrapper is intended to stay.

critical_code_review_comments: vendor_ack_routes.run_state is a module-level dict (same pattern as eway_routes) — safe for single-worker uvicorn, would break with multi-worker. Consider DB-backed lock for scale.

process_ack: retry_count is only $inc'd when the process fails all MAX_RETRIES attempts; intermediate Retry events don't reflect in retry_count. Acceptable but worth documenting: retry_count == batch failures, not individual attempts.
vendor_ack_routes.join_row hardcodes company_code to 'TMTL' regardless of md.customer_code — matches PRD 'default TMTL' but ignores any stored value. Fine for the current 2-plant scope.
MasterDispatchInput does not validate that plant is one of the seeded plants — free-form string accepted. UI enforces via dropdown; API is intentionally lenient (allows admin-added plants). OK.
seed_data_creation: Created ~10 TEST_* Master Dispatch records via POST /api/master-dispatch during tests (ASNTEST100, NOTFOUND_ASN_1, ACKED_ASN_1, ERR_ASN_1, plus UI test record GEW-MD-00025). Also added a 'TEST_PLANT_<ts>' plant via admin endpoint. Not auto-cleaned (matches previous iteration pattern) - safe for regression.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Ack backend fully covered by /app/backend/tests/test_vendor_ack.py. Run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_vendor_ack.py -v -o addopts=''`. TEST mode ~2-4s per run; only one automation run at a time (409). Use fresh MD records for run tests (existing GEW-MD-00007/00025 already Completed will return 400). Plants list will include TEST_PLANT_* left over from earlier admin add-plant tests. Console has a benign hydration warning from visual-editor <span>-in-<option> injection — not a product bug.
